settings.heading: Open a support request with the right context
settings.copy: Use this form when self-service is not enough and the next step depends on your exact product or order.
settings.support_note: Have the product name, order reference, and setup details ready so support can move faster.

settings.heading: Submit a support request
settings.copy: Send the details support needs so the next step is clear from the first reply.
settings.side_copy: Product name, order reference, setup context, and the issue summary are the fastest path to a response.
settings.success_message: Thanks for reaching out. Your message has been sent.

settings.heading: Try a guided path before you submit
settings.copy: Downloads, manuals, compatibility, and troubleshooting can solve the issue faster when the answer is already known.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.copy: Open drivers and utilities tied to your product before you submit a request.

settings.title: Manuals
settings.copy: Open setup guides and user documentation when the issue is install-related.

settings.title: Compatibility
settings.copy: Confirm device and workflow fit before you submit a direct support request.
